ACTSFROMTHEPAST-REBALANCED_MODE.title: Rebalanced Mode
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-REBALANCED_MODE.hover.de:
Rebalances legacy content to better match Slay the Spire 2's environment. Currently only targets events.

Disabled by default (but it's recommended to try it out!).
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-ALLOW_NON_LEGACY_SHARED_: Allow Non-Legacy Shared Events in Legacy Acts

When enabled, shared events from Slay the Spire 2 or other mods can still appear in legacy acts.

Enabled by default.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-ALLOW_LEGACY_SHARED_EVEN: Allow Legacy Shared Events in Non-Legacy Acts

When enabled, shared events added by Acts From The Past can appear in non-legacy acts, such as base game acts or acts added by other mods.

Disabled by default.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-DARV_ONLY_IN_LEGACY_ACTS:
Makes it so Darv is always the Ancient in The City and The Beyond, more closely mirroring the boss relic system from Slay the Spire 1.

It is recommended to run this with the [gold]Act Toggler[/gold] mod.

Disabled by default.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-LEGACY_ENEMIES_GIVE_CLAS:
Makes it so [green]Slimed[/green] cards generated by Acts From The Past enemies lose the "draw a card" effect, matching how [green]Slimed[/green] works in Slay the Spire 1.

Disabled by default.
